subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and hath thereby made mention of whomsoever He willeth among His creation. He, verily, is the All-Powerful, the Almighty. Blessed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و ذکر بها من یشاء من خلقه انه لهو المقتدر القدیر طوبی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
